items.title: Coventry's Lampard named LMA manager of the year
items.summary: Frank Lampard is named the League Managers Association manager of the year after guiding Coventry back to the Premier League.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Josh Jacobs faces five charges after domestic disturbance call
items.summary: The NFL and Packers confirmed they are aware of the arrest.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Stubbs fires on debut as Hampshire Hawks down Essex Eagles
items.summary: South African whacks unbeaten 69 off 42 before Scott Currie's four-for seals points for home side
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
